name: IRC_REG_RESPONSE_ETHNICITY_V
query: select r.response_id, r.submission_id, r.person_id, trim(regexp_substr(attribute_2,'[^,]+', 1, level) ) ethnicity_code, 1 as rowlevel from irc_regulatory_responses r connect by regexp_substr(attribute_2, '[^,]+', 1, level) is not null and PRIOR response_id = response_id and PRIOR SYS_GUID() is not null
